info.title: SpendSense API
info.description: SpendSense Ethiopia — Cost of Living, Budget & Smart Shopping API

Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: Paste ONE access token only. Format: Bearer eyJ... (single JWT, three parts). Do not paste the whole JSON from login, multiple tokens, or quotes. Copy only the string value of the "access" field from POST /api/auth/token/.

post.description: JWT token view that accepts 'email' (or 'username') and 'password'.

email.description: User email (mapped to username for JWT).

post.description:
Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this vendor.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this price submission.

get.description: Reads `Forecast` rows; if none, returns stub from last approved average.
GET /api/market/items/ — list tracked items (seeded via seed_items).
Daily average from approved submissions (time series for charts).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this user.

post.summary: Confirm password reset with uid + token
post.description: POST /api/users/password/reset/confirm/ — complete reset from Week 3 reset-password page.
POST /api/users/password/reset/request/ — email link for Week 3 forgot-password flow.
POST /api/users/register/ — browsable API + schema show RegisterSerializer body.
